notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert reaches on a fielding error by shortstop CJ Abrams.

notableEvents.label: Dylan Crews GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Crews grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. CJ Abrams out at 2nd. Dylan Crews out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert reaches on a fielding error by shortstop CJ Abrams.

notableEvents.label: Casey Schmitt GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Casey Schmitt grounds into a double play, shortstop CJ Abrams to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Curtis Mead. Drew Gilbert out at 2nd. Casey Schmitt out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Clayton Beeter on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Jonah Cox pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Cox out on a sacrifice bunt to first baseman Curtis Mead. Bryce Eldridge scores. Matt Chapman to 3rd.
